name: Autumn Apple Shortcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix Bisquick, water, sugar, and shredded orange peel in a bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into greased baking cups or lined muffin tin.
4. Place apple slices on top of the batter in each cup.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Allow to cool before serving.
